summary: Testing completed for 5 requested features. 4 features working correctly, 1 issue found: Dashboard Settings tab (containing Owner Wallet and External Branches feature toggles) is missing from Settings tabs navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard Settings tab (value='dashboard') has TabsContent but no TabsTrigger - feature toggles for Owner Wallet and External Branches are inaccessible from UI

action_items: Add TabsTrigger for 'dashboard' value in Settings.js tabs list (around line 1541) to make Dashboard Settings accessible
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js line 1732 has TabsContent value='dashboard' but no corresponding TabsTrigger in the TabsList (lines 1429-1549)
The dashboard settings containing showOwnerWallet and showExternalBranches toggles (lines 2012-2038) are not accessible from UI
seed_data_creation: Updated branch 'Alsaydaia' to be a sold branch with buyer_name='أحمد محمد', owner_percentage=15, monthly_fee=500000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Settings tab needs TabsTrigger added. All other features working: cash-register/summary API accepts branch_id, branch edit dialog has sold branch fields, branch card shows percentage and buyer, External Branches page has correct buttons.

verified: API accepts branch_id as Query parameter
Returns shift summary with correct branch filtering

branch_card_percentage_display.description: Branch card shows percentage and buyer name for sold branches
verified: 15% badge displayed on Alsaydaia branch card
Only shows for branches with is_sold_branch=true

branch_edit_sold_fields.description: Branch edit dialog saves is_sold_branch, buyer_name, owner_percentage, monthly_fee
verified: إعدادات الفرع الخارجي section with Store icon visible
اسم المشتري/المستفيد field visible when switch enabled
نسبتك من المبيعات (%) field with % symbol visible
Info box explaining dues calculation visible

external_branches_button_removed.description: Top button 'تسجيل فرع مباع' removed from External Branches page
verified: تسجيل فرع مباع button NOT present in header
Info message directing to Settings visible
الذهاب للإعدادات button visible in empty state
Sold branches display correctly with percentage badge

dashboard_settings_feature_toggles.description: Owner Wallet and External Branches toggles in Dashboard Settings
dashboard_settings_feature_toggles.issue: TabsContent exists but TabsTrigger missing - settings not accessible from UI
